episodes.title: i was in a cult. (inside the IFB troubled teen industry)
episodes.description:
when i was 15 years old, i was sent to an independent fundamental baptist (ifb) girls home that was part of the troubled teen industry.

after sharing some of my experiences online, many people asked for the full story in one long video. in this video, i talk about how i ended up there, what daily life was like, the rules, punishments, how i got out and how the experience continues to affect me today. 

this video reflects my personal experiences, memories, and opinions!!
